chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 193 of 2017 C.P.No. D- 256 of 2017 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case (Priority) 1.For hearing of CMA 1182/2017 2.For hearing of Main Case 29-03-2023 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for petitioners in both matters. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant P.G. ***** C.P.No.D-193 of 2017. Through instant petition, petitioner seeks setting aside of notice dated 05.01.2017, issued by respondent No.6 (Assistant Executive Engineer, Irrigation Sub-Division, Pano Akil) for vacating government land in his favour. In compliance of this Court’s order dated 02.09.2020, the Survey Superintendent, Sukkur Division at Khairpur submitted report, which reflects that a joint demarcation was fixed on 28.11.2020 by the Mukhtiarkar, Taluka Pano Akil, which was carried on in presence of all the concerned parties as well as government officials concerned, which reflects that the petitioner’s land/property is 33 feet away from the government/irrigation land. Learned counsel for the petitioner, on being satisfied with the alleged demarcation report, does not press this petition further; however, he states that the petitioner, who is occupying his land under 2 a valid title, shall not be dispossessed from his land without due process of law. Order accordingly. C.P.No.D-256 of 2017 Learned counsel for the petitioner requests for a date, as he is not prepared today. Adjourned to a date in office. Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
